scripts.wasm:configure: cd ../core && conan install . --profile=../fleaux-visual/wasm/emscripten_wasm_full -o '&:build_wasm_coordinator=True' --build=missing && bash -lc '. cmake-build-wasm/Release/generators/conanbuild.sh && cmake -S . -B cmake-build-wasm/Release -G "Unix Makefiles" -DCMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE=cmake-build-wasm/Release/generators/conan_toolchain.cmake -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DBUILD_TESTING=OFF -DFLEAUX_BUILD_WASM_COORDINATOR=ON'
scripts.wasm:smoke: npm run wasm:configure && npm run wasm:build
scripts.test:wasm: npm run wasm:smoke && playwright test tests/wasm-coordinator.spec.ts
scripts.build: npm run generate:std && tsc -b && vite build
scripts.build:pages: npm run generate:std && tsc -b && vite build
